messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'fetchLog', 'fetchPlayers', 'fetchRetained', 'fetchTeams', 'handleLogChange', 'handlePlayerChange', 'handleRetainedChange', and 'handleTeamChange'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchLog, fetchPlayers, fetchRetained, fetchTeams, handleLogChange, handlePlayerChange, handleRetainedChange, handleTeamChange]

messages.message: The 'retained' conditional could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 59) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'retained' in its own useMemo() Hook.
